name: milkshakes-drs-monorepo
description: Milkshakes DRS - Arquitectura de Microservicios con Frontend React, API Gateway y Servicios Backend

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=frontend" "npm run dev --workspace=services/api-gateway" "npm run dev --workspace=services/product-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/cart-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/order-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/user-service"
scripts.dev:services: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=services/api-gateway" "npm run dev --workspace=services/product-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/cart-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/order-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/user-service"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm start --workspace=services/api-gateway" "npm start --workspace=services/product-service" "npm start --workspace=services/cart-service" "npm start --workspace=services/order-service" "npm start --workspace=services/user-service"

author: Milkshakes DRS Team
